title: pelargonium × hollandianum
intro: Pelargonium × hollandianum, commonly known as the Cape Geranium or Rose Pelargonium, is a hybrid plant species within the Geraniaceae family, resulting from a cross between Pelargonium capitatum and Pelargonium triste. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oil, which contains geraniol and linalool, compounds with antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Pelargonium × hollandianum include relieving symptoms of colds, coughs, and respiratory issues, as well as reducing inflammation and promoting relaxation. The plant's essential oil is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, as well as in aromatherapy and skincare products.
